details.test: Task 1: Weekly subscription for cheapest 5-gallon spring water under max price
Task 2: One-time order with three different water products

Task 6: Add two high-rating water products within price range
Task 7: Help Center minimum order and adjust cart subtotal
Task 8: Rent dispenser and add four 5-gallon bottles, schedule within 7 days
